detailedDescription:
16GB DDR4 dual-channel kit.
The sweet spot for gaming and everyday productivity on DDR4 platforms.
additionalSpecs:
Capacity: 16GB
Generation: DDR4
Bandwidth: Up to 25.6 GB/s per channel (DDR4-3200)
Voltage: 1.2V (1.35V for XMP/OC)
Slots: 2 x 8GB (dual-channel)
XMP / EXPO Support: Yes
Compatible Sockets: LGA1200, LGA1700, AM4
